heading: Pumphreys Bridge vs Purnululu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pumphreys Bridge, Western Australia and Purnululu, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Purnululu has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Pumphreys Bridge (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pumphreys Bridge or Purnululu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pumphreys Bridge has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Purnululu scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pumphreys Bridge scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Purnululu scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pumphreys Bridge or Purnululu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Purnululu has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
